scripts.dev: yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/server dev & yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/extension dev
scripts.build: yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/shared build && yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/server build && yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/extension build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/shared typecheck && yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/server typecheck && yarn workspace @jira-epic-gantt/extension typecheck
